description.ko: 유기적 생명체와 첨단 사이버네틱스가 융합되어 디지털 세상 속 자연의 본질을 새롭게 정의하는 FLORA-9의 환상적인 모습입니다.
description.en: A breathtaking representation of FLORA-9, where organic life merges with advanced cybernetics to redefine the essence of nature in a digital world.

prompt: A hyper-realistic close-up of FLORA-9, a futuristic cybernetic plant with translucent holographic petals and glowing fiber-optic veins. The plant is growing from a crystalline substrate, emitting a soft blue bioluminescent pulse. The background is a dark, sleek laboratory with floating data fragments and digital particles. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, cyberpunk aesthetic, intricate textures.
